{{Quote|Readings indicate that the shift shields were overridden and the ship was hulled to the point of vacating ninety-five percent of its atmosphere.|Darth Vader, to Commander Daine Jir|<ref name="ANH novel SE">[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' novelization]], [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] foreword by [[George Lucas]]</ref>}}
'''Shift shields''' were a kind of [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] protecting [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|captured and destroyed]] the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]. He blamed the destruction of the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] on the failure of its shift shields in order to hide his actions from the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]].

==Characteristics==
Shift [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were a type of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] shield that protected against physical objects such as [[Asteroid/Legends|meteoroids]]. If the shields were overridden, the incoming objects could break the hull, causing [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] loss.<ref name="EP4NOVEL" />

==History==
[[File:Jir_Vader.png|thumb|right|250px|Darth Vader instucted Daine Jir to send a distress signal aboard the ''Tantive IV''.]]
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], during the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|battle of Tatooine]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']] pursued, captured, and destroyed the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']], an [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] vessel.<ref name="DB-Rebel blockade runners">{{DB|starship|tantiveiv|Rebel blockade runners}}</ref> [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] instructed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Daine Jir/Legends|Daine Jir]] to send a distress signal to indicate the failure of the ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} shift shields in a meteoroid shower in order to explain the destruction of the vessel to the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]].<ref name="EP4NOVEL" />

==Behind the scenes==
The first and only mention of shift shields was in the [[December]] [[1976]] [[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|novelization]] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']],<ref name="EP4NOVEL" /> ghostwritten by [[Alan Dean Foster]].<ref name="ANH novel SE" /> The function of these shields was similar to [[Particle shield/Legends|particle shields]]<ref name="The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref><ref name="The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> or concussion shields,<ref name="Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections">''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]''</ref> which were mentioned in later sources.
